question_text: Name two ways that friction can be reduced between two surfaces.
correct_answer: Any two of: using a lubricant (oil or grease), polishing surfaces to make them smoother, using ball bearings or rollers, or reducing the contact area between surfaces.
explanation: Friction can be reduced through several methods: lubricants like oil reduce friction by creating a slippery layer between surfaces; smoother surfaces have less friction than rough ones; ball bearings or rollers reduce friction by changing sliding friction to rolling friction; and reducing the contact area between two surfaces also decreases friction.
